description: Single clear factual statement should be extracted as-is

input: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level. The speed of light is approximately 300,000 km per second.
expected_claims: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at sea level.
The speed of light is approximately 300,000 km per second.
description: Multiple factual claims should each be extracted

input: Chocolate ice cream is the best flavor.
description: Pure opinion should result in no claims

input: Paris is the capital of France, and it's the most beautiful city in the world.
must_include: Paris is the capital of France
description: Should extract fact but not subjective opinion

input: Drinking 8 glasses of water a day is essential for health.
description: Health claims should be extracted for verification

input: Approximately 70% of the Earth's surface is covered by water.
I went to the grocery store yesterday afternoon.
description: Trivial personal facts nobody would check should not be extracted

input: I think it will rain tomorrow.
description: Speculative predictions without factual basis should not be extracted

input: The Great Wall of China is visible from space. It was built over many centuries starting from the 7th century BC. Some people think it's overrated as a tourist destination.
description: Should extract factual claims from paragraph, may or may not include the disputed 'visible from space' claim
